 -Justifications : wi|Type|Tiago, Tiago|SubClassOf|Agent, wi|hasCapability|yeew, yeew|isCapabilityOf|wi, wi|hasComponent|yd, yd|Type|RealsenseD435i, RealsenseD435i|SubClassOf|Camera, xwvkw|Type|Box, Box|SubClassOf|Object, xwvkw|hasDisposition|wjcu, wjcu|isDispositionOf|xwvkw, xwvkw|hasPart|ar, ar|Type|QRTag, QRTag|SubClassOf|ScannablePart, xwvkw|isVisibleBy|wi, yd|Type|RealsenseD435i, RealsenseD435i|SubClassOf|Camera, wi|hasComponent|yd, yd|hasMaximumDistanceRange|integer#98, xwvkw|isAtDistance|integer#19, greaterThan(integer#98,integer#19) 
 -Rules : Agent(?a), hasCapability(?a, ?c), PerceivingCapability(?c), Object(?o), hasDisposition(?o, ?d), PerceivingDisposition(?d), isVisibleBy(?o,?a), Camera(?g), hasComponent(?a,?g), hasMaximumDistanceRange(?g,?w1), isAtDistance(?o,?w2), greaterThan(?w1,?w2) -> canPerceive(?a, ?o)
	PerceivingCapability|EquivalentTo|(isCapabilityOf some (hasComponent some Camera)
	PerceivingDisposition|EquivalentTo|(isDispositionOf some (hasPart some ScannablePart))
answers.answer: the tiago robot can perceive the box because it has a perceiving capability, it has a realsense d435i component, and the realsense d435i has a maximum distance range that is greater than the distance at which the box is located.
